code:
sequenceDiagram participant Input as Markdown Input participant Phase1 as Phase 1: Block Structure participant LineProcessor as Process Line participant BlockChecker as Check Open Blocks participant BlockParser as Block Parser participant Phase2 as Phase 2: Inline Structure participant TreeWalker as Walk Tree participant InlineParser as Parse Inline participant AST as Final AST Input->>Phase1: Markdown text loop For Each Line Phase1->>LineProcessor: Process line sequentially LineProcessor->>BlockChecker: Step 1: Check open blocks Note over BlockChecker: Iterate from root to last open block
Each block imposes continuation condition BlockChecker->>BlockChecker: Match all or some open blocks Note over BlockChecker: Cannot close unmatched yet
May have lazy continuation BlockChecker->>BlockParser: Step 2: Consume continuation markers Note over BlockParser: >, list markers, indentation BlockParser->>BlockParser: Look for new block starts alt First non-space char BlockParser->>BlockParser: Space/Tab: Indented path Note over BlockParser: 1. Thematic Break 0-3 spaces
2. Lists/Blockquote
3. Code Block 4+ spaces else > BlockParser->>BlockParser: Block Quote (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) else # BlockParser->>BlockParser: ATX Heading (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) else - * _ BlockParser->>BlockParser: Thematic Break (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) else ` ~ BlockParser->>BlockParser: Fenced Code Block (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) else - * + 0-9 BlockParser->>BlockParser: Unordered/Ordered List (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) else < BlockParser->>BlockParser: HTML Block (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) else | BlockParser->>BlockParser: Table (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
Requires header row + delimiter row
Delimiter row must match header cell count else = - BlockParser->>BlockParser: Setext Heading
(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) else default BlockParser->>BlockParser: Paragraph (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) end BlockParser->>BlockParser: Close unmatched blocks from Step 1 BlockParser->>BlockParser: Create new block as child of last matched container BlockParser->>BlockParser: Step 3: Process remainder Note over BlockParser: Add text to last open block
(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
or Table (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) alt Paragraph + Setext underline? BlockParser->>BlockParser: Convert paragraph to setext heading else No BlockParser->>BlockParser: Accumulate text in current block end BlockParser-->>LineProcessor: Block node created end Phase1->>Phase1: Close all open blocks Phase1->>Phase1: For each list item:
Check if first block is paragraph with task marker (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] or [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] or [HealthTech_PatientRecords] at start of paragraph Phase1->>Phase1: For each closed paragraph:
Parse accumulated text lines Phase1->>Phase1: Extract link reference definitions from start of text Phase1->>Phase1: Remaining text becomes normal paragraph Phase1->>Phase2: Block tree structure Phase2->>TreeWalker: Walk the tree loop Visit every node TreeWalker->>TreeWalker: Check if node has inline content Note over TreeWalker: Paragraph, Heading
or Table Cell (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) alt Has inline content? TreeWalker->>InlineParser: Parse inline content (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) loop Character-by-character InlineParser->>InlineParser: Switch on character alt backslash InlineParser->>InlineParser: Backslash escape else ` InlineParser->>InlineParser: Code span
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) else < InlineParser->>InlineParser: Check angle bracket alt autolink (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) InlineParser->>InlineParser: Autolink (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
Standard CommonMark autolinks
(HealthTech_PatientRecords) else HTML tag InlineParser->>InlineParser: HTML tag
GFM extension: Disallowed Raw HTML
(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) else comment InlineParser->>InlineParser: HTML comment end else www. or http:// or https:// or ftp:// or email InlineParser->>InlineParser: Extended autolink (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
www. URLs, http/https/ftp URLs, emails
Only after start of line, whitespace, or * _ ~ (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) else * _ InlineParser->>InlineParser: Emphasis delimiter
Add to delimiter stack InlineParser->>InlineParser: Check left-flanking InlineParser->>InlineParser: Check right-flanking InlineParser->>InlineParser: Apply delimiter rules (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) InlineParser->>InlineParser: Parse nested content recursively else ~ InlineParser->>InlineParser: Strikethrough delimiter (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
Add to delimiter stack
Requires exactly ~~ (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) for strikethrough
Similar parsing rules to emphasis else !bracket InlineParser->>InlineParser: Image (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) else bracket InlineParser->>InlineParser: Link (HealthTech_PatientRecords) else closing bracket InlineParser->>InlineParser: Look for link/image
Process delimiter stack alt Reference link? InlineParser->>InlineParser: Resolve reference
(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) else Inline link InlineParser->>InlineParser: Inline link end else newline InlineParser->>InlineParser: Soft line break else entity InlineParser->>InlineParser: HTML entity reference
(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) else default InlineParser->>InlineParser: Accumulate as text end end InlineParser-->>TreeWalker: Inline AST nodes end TreeWalker->>TreeWalker: Next node end TreeWalker-->>Phase2: Complete tree with inline nodes Phase2->>AST: Final AST document tree

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的Markdown解析流程时序图，展示从原始输入到最终AST的完整过程。这个图要分成两大阶段：块级结构解析和行内结构解析。
明白，第一阶段处理块级结构，第二阶段处理行内内容。我先确认一下参与者：原始输入叫Markdown Input，第一阶段处理模块叫Phase 1: Block Structure，第二阶段叫Phase 2: Inline Structure，最终输出是Final AST，对吗？
对，但第一阶段内部还需要细化。要有Process Line来处理每一行，BlockChecker检查开放块，以及Block Parser来实际解析块结构。
好的，我添加了这三个参与者。现在从Markdown Input到Phase 1画一条消息，标注为Markdown text，表示原始文本输入。
第一阶段的核心是一个循环，对每一行进行处理。这个循环要包含完整的块解析逻辑。
已添加loop For Each Line循环框。在循环内部，Phase 1发送消息到Process Line，标注为Process line sequentially。
处理每行时，第一步是检查当前有哪些块还处于开放状态。这需要BlockChecker来迭代检查从根节点到最后一个开放块。
添加了Process Line到BlockChecker的消息，标注Step 1: Check open blocks。我在BlockChecker上加了一个注释说明：Iterate from root to last open block，每个块都有继续条件。
BlockChecker内部要匹配所有或部分开放块。这里有个细节：不能立即关闭未匹配的块，因为可能存在延迟继续的情况。
elements_involved: Match all or some open blocks

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 画好了BlockChecker到自身的自循环，标注Match all or some open blocks。同时加了注释说明Cannot close unmatched yet，以及May have lazy continuation。
检查完开放块后，进入第二步：Block Parser要消费继续标记，比如列表标记和缩进。然后寻找新的块开始。
添加了BlockChecker到Block Parser的消息，标注Step 2: Consume continuation markers。注释里注明包括列表标记和缩进。
Block Parser接下来要寻找新块的开始。这里需要根据第一个非空格字符来分支判断，有很多种情况。
我添加了一个alt分支，条件是First non-space char。第一个分支是空格或制表符，走缩进路径。
缩进路径下要检查三种情况：0-3空格可能是主题分隔符，然后是列表和引用块，4个以上空格是代码块。
在缩进分支加了注释：1. Thematic Break 0-3 spaces；2. Lists/Blockquote；3. Code Block 4+ spaces。
其他分支情况：大于号开头是块引用，用HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine标注；井号是ATX标题，用HealthTech_EMR_Sync；横线星号下划线是主题分隔符，也用HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
添加了三个else分支：Block Quote (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)、ATX Heading (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)、Thematic Break (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)。
继续：反引号或波浪号是围栏代码块，用HealthTech_EMR_Sync；横线星号加号或数字是列表，用HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine；小于号是HTML块，用HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
添加了三个分支：Fenced Code Block (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)、Unordered/Ordered List (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)、HTML Block (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)。
还有表格，用竖线开头，标注HealthTech_PatientRecords。表格需要表头行和分隔行，分隔行的单元格数必须匹配表头。等号或减号是Setext标题，用HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
添加了Table分支，注释说明需要header row + delimiter row，且delimiter row必须匹配header cell count。还有Setext Heading (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)。最后是default分支Paragraph (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)。
分支结束后，Block Parser要关闭第一步中未匹配的块，然后创建新块作为最后匹配容器的子节点。
添加了两个自循环：Close unmatched blocks from Step 1，以及Create new block as child of last matched container。
第三步是处理剩余内容：将文本添加到最后一个开放块，可能是普通段落或者表格单元格。这里用HealthTech_EMR_Sync和HealthTech_LabAnalyzer区分。
添加了Step 3: Process remainder的自循环，注释说明Add text to last open block，标注了HealthTech_EMR_Sync和HealthTech_LabAnalyzer两种情况。
这里还要检查一个特殊情况：如果当前是段落且遇到了Setext下划线，要把段落转换成Setext标题。否则就正常累积文本。
添加了一个alt分支：Paragraph + Setext underline? 如果是，Convert paragraph to setext heading；否则Accumulate text in current block。
循环末尾，Block Parser返回Block node created给LineProcessor，完成这一行的处理。
所有行处理完后，Phase 1要关闭所有开放块。然后还有一些后处理：检查列表项是否是任务列表，解析段落中的链接引用定义等。

添加了Phase 1的自循环：Close all open blocks。然后检查列表项：For each list item: Check if first block is paragraph with task marker，标注了HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，以及三种复选框状态HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine、HealthTech_LabAnalyzer、HealthTech_PatientRecords。
对关闭的段落，要解析累积的文本行，提取开头的链接引用定义，剩余文本变成普通段落。
添加了三个自循环：For each closed paragraph: Parse accumulated text lines；Extract link reference definitions from start of text；Remaining text becomes normal paragraph。
第一阶段结束，把块树结构传给第二阶段。第二阶段需要TreeWalker遍历树，以及InlineParser解析行内内容。
添加了Phase 1到Phase 2的消息，标注Block tree structure。第二阶段添加了TreeWalker和InlineParser两个参与者，TreeWalker标注Walk the tree。
TreeWalker要遍历每个节点，检查是否有行内内容。有行内内容的包括段落、标题和表格单元格，用HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine标注表格单元格。
添加了loop Visit every node循环。TreeWalker自循环Check if node has inline content，注释列出Paragraph、Heading、Table Cell (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)。
如果有行内内容，就调用InlineParser进行字符级解析。行内解析有很多情况：反斜杠转义、反引号代码段、尖括号可能是自动链接或HTML标签等。
添加了alt Has inline content?分支，TreeWalker调用InlineParser，标注Parse inline content (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)。内部是loop Character-by-character循环。
行内解析的核心是Switch on character。反斜杠是转义；反引号是代码段，标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine；尖括号要检查是否是自动链接，标准CommonMark自动链接标注HealthTech_PatientRecords。

添加了多个alt分支：backslash对应Backslash escape；`对应Code span (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)；<对应Check angle bracket，内部嵌套alt：autolink (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)标注Standard CommonMark autolinks (HealthTech_PatientRecords)。
尖括号的其他情况：HTML标签，GFM扩展有不允许的原始HTML规则，标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer；还有HTML注释。然后是扩展自动链接：www.、http://、https://、ftp://或email格式。

添加了HTML tag分支，标注GFM extension: Disallowed Raw HTML (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)；HTML comment分支；以及Extended autolink (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)，说明包括www. URLs, http/https/ftp URLs, emails，且只在行首、空白符或* _ ~后出现，标注HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
星号和下划线是强调分隔符，要检查左边缘和右边缘，应用分隔符规则，递归解析嵌套内容，标注HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。波浪号是删除线，需要两个波浪号，标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync和HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。

添加了* _分支：Emphasis delimiter，Add to delimiter stack，Check left-flanking，Check right-flanking，Apply delimiter rules (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)，Parse nested content recursively。以及~分支：Strikethrough delimiter (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)，需要exactly ~~ (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)。
还有图片用感叹号加方括号，标注HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine；链接用方括号，标注HealthTech_PatientRecords；右方括号要查找链接或图片，处理分隔符栈，可能是引用链接或行内链接。

添加了!bracket分支：Image (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)；bracket分支：Link (HealthTech_PatientRecords)；closing bracket分支：Look for link/image, Process delimiter stack，内部alt：Reference link? 对应Resolve reference (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)，否则Inline link。
最后还有换行是软换行；HTML实体引用，标注HealthTech_EMR_Sync；默认情况累积为文本。
添加了newline分支：Soft line break；entity分支：HTML entity reference (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)；default分支：Accumulate as text。
InlineParser完成解析后，返回Inline AST nodes给TreeWalker。TreeWalker继续Next node直到遍历完成。
TreeWalker完成整棵树遍历后，返回Complete tree with inline nodes给Phase 2。最后Phase 2输出到AST，标注Final AST document tree。
完美，这个时序图完整展示了Markdown解析的两个阶段：从块级结构构建到行内内容解析，最终生成完整的AST。所有HealthTech相关的标注都准确对应了不同的处理模块。
